payload.issue_summary: Vehicle price stack fields showing incorrect values on high-value SUV inventory. Market adjustment and final price fields appear to be calculated incorrectly — showing values 15-40% below expected.
support_actions_attempted: Cache refresh for affected dealer accounts — no change
Manual data sync trigger — no change
Checked dealer portal configuration — no issues found
payload.notes: Support has exhausted standard troubleshooting. Escalating to platform team for investigation.

payload.search_query: price stack incorrect field values dealer

most_relevant_incident.summary: Similar price field anomaly reported by Midwest dealer group. Root cause: field mapping logic error in price-stack-service deployment. Resolved by reverting field mapper config and flushing price cache. Resolution time: 47 minutes.
resolution_steps: Identified bad deployment via GHE deploy log correlation
Flushed price cache for affected accounts

second_incident.summary: Price stack MSRP field showing stale values. Root cause: caching issue, not a deployment. Resolved by cache flush alone.

payload.pattern_match: HIGH — June incident shares same symptom profile and same service. Deploy correlation likely.
payload.notes: Prior incident strongly suggests checking recent price-stack-service deployments. June incident resolved without full rollback.

most_recent_deploy.pr_title: Refactor price stack field mapping — consolidate MSRP and market adjustment logic
most_recent_deploy.author: platform-eng-02
most_recent_deploy.change_summary: Consolidated price stack field mapping. Changed calculation logic for market_adjustment and final_price fields.

payload.timing_correlation: STRONG — deploy 73 minutes before issue onset. price-stack-mapper.ts directly maps the affected fields.
other_deploys_reviewed: DEP002: vehicle-inventory-api pagination — 20 hours prior, no price logic
DEP003: field-validation VIN rules — 4 days prior, no price logic
payload.hypothesis: PR-4471 changed price stack field mapping logic. The refactored calculation likely introduced an offset error for high-value vehicles.
payload.notes: Author platform-eng-02 is available — merged during business hours today.

payload.query: index=platform service=price-stack-service sourcetype=app_logs level=DEBUG price_stack_mapper since=08:00

findings.silent_failure_description: price-stack-mapper.ts computing final_price as: MSRP - market_adjustment (correct). But for vehicles where MSRP > 45000, a new offset constant introduced in PR-4471 is being applied incorrectly — subtracting an additional $8,400-$12,600 from final_price depending on trim level.
findings.affected_condition: MSRP > $45,000 AND trim_level IN (Limited, Platinum, King Ranch, Raptor)
findings.validation_status: PASSING — field-validation-service accepts these values as numerically valid

option_a.label: Targeted patch
option_a.description: Fix the offset calculation in price-stack-mapper.ts. Estimated 20 minutes to implement, test, and deploy.
option_a.risk: LOW — surgical change to the specific calculation error
option_a.data_repair_description: Re-process the 3,847 affected records after patch deploys

option_b.label: Full rollback of PR-4471
option_b.risk: MEDIUM — also reverts two unrelated bug fixes in the same PR
option_b.data_repair_description: Re-process all records written since 08:47 today

option_c.label: Field override
option_c.description: Manually override price_stack fields for affected dealers while fix is prepared.
option_c.risk: HIGH — manual intervention at scale, high error risk

payload.notes: Root cause confirmed. Silent failure — no exceptions thrown because offset values are numerically valid. Standard error monitoring would not catch this.

payload.api_performance: HEALTHY — response times normal, no latency impact

queue_status.note: Queue elevated due to volume of updates triggered by corrupted records. No DLQ accumulation.

payload.estimated_revenue_impact: 47 dealers potentially underpricing high-value inventory. If any transactions completed at incorrect prices, financial reconciliation required.
payload.notes: Blast radius is contained to high-value trim levels. 89% of dealer inventory is unaffected. Issue is isolated and fixable.

payload.pr_title: Fix price stack offset calculation for high-value trim levels
payload.patch_description: Corrected offset constant application in price-stack-mapper.ts. Offset now only applied for fleet pricing context, not retail context.
payload.post_deploy_validation: PASSED — sample records re-processed show correct final_price values
payload.impact: Price stack field mapping restored to correct values for all affected trim levels.

payload.validation_result: PASSED — all reprocessed records show correct price stack values
payload.intervention_impact: Targeted patch approach preserved 2 unrelated bug fixes from PR-4471. Full rollback was not required.
payload.notes: Issue fully resolved. Total time from escalation to resolution: 67 minutes. Prior incident resolution time was 47 minutes — comparable.

payload.root_cause: Incorrect offset constant application in price-stack-mapper.ts introduced in PR-4471
preventive_actions_identified: Add integration test for price stack calculation across all trim levels
Add business logic validation to field-validation-service for price reasonableness
Add price variance monitoring alert to detect silent failures
payload.intervention_impact: Human decision to pursue targeted patch over rollback preserved 2 unrelated bug fixes and reduced data repair scope.
payload.notes: Incident closed. Resolution documentation added to #incidents channel.

payload.escalation_trigger: No resolution action taken within 30 minutes of root cause confirmation. Dealer complaint rate continues to climb.
payload.financial_reconciliation_risk: ELEVATED — 12 potential transactions at incorrect prices require investigation
payload.notes: Escalation to P1 triggered by inaction. Problem that could have been resolved with a targeted 20-minute patch is now a P1 incident with financial reconciliation risk.

unrelated_fixes_lost: Fix for edge case in fleet pricing calculation
Performance improvement for bulk price updates
payload.data_repair_scope: ALL records written since 08:47 — estimated 18,000+ records
payload.cascade_from: OPS005 blast radius ignored, OPS004 fix options not acted upon
payload.notes: Full rollback required due to inaction. More disruptive than the targeted patch that was available 40 minutes ago. Financial reconciliation investigation now required.
